name: Tatlubaaz
overview: Bulbul, a notorious con-man, wants to live a rich and luxurious life; finds himself in the middle of Tatlubaazi(phishing) in Banaras. Disha and Isabelle traps Bulbul in a series of mishaps filled with loot, deceit and murder.

trailers.title: Tatlubaaz Trailer 2  | Dheeraj Dhoopar | Nargis Fakhri | Divya Agarwal | EPIC ON
